frontend.name: frontend
frontend.description: Unified frontend delivery covering UI architecture, motion, accessibility, and conversion clarity.
frontend.evidence: Frontend usability audit, accessibility checks, and visual regression output.

backend.name: backend
backend.description: Backend delivery with strict layer separation, validation, and safe data access.
backend.evidence: Unit tests, API contracts, and release gate output.

fullstack.name: fullstack
fullstack.description: Single-path product delivery across frontend and backend boundaries.
fullstack.evidence: End-to-end tests, contract validation, and feature parity review.

cli.name: cli
cli.description: Smart command-line delivery with safe defaults, machine-readable output, and upgrade flows.
cli.evidence: CLI smoke tests, dry-run output, and automation-friendly reports.

distribution.name: distribution
distribution.description: Package safety, rollback, compatibility, and release hygiene.
distribution.evidence: Install validation, rollback verification, and publish dry-run logs.

review-quality.name: review-quality
review-quality.description: Planning, review, benchmark, and security discipline for every change.
review-quality.evidence: PR review output, benchmark report, and security audit results.
